name: The Banana Secret
tags: 英文提問 Ask in English

beats.en: Did you see that free kick? The ball CURVED around the wall!
beats.zh: 看到那記自由球了嗎?球彎繞過人牆!

beats.en: Ask the coach the science question.

opts.s: 球為什麼會彎?(正確提問)

opts.t: Where can I buy a hot dog?

beats.fbOk: 好問題!'Why did the ball curve?' — 我們來親手試試看。
beats.fbNo: 想學物理,要先問對問題:'Why did the ball curve?'

beats.en: When the ball SPINS, the air moves faster on one side. That side has lower push, so the ball bends toward it. That's the secret!
beats.zh: 當球旋轉時,一側的空氣跑得比較快、推力較小,球就往那側彎。這就是祕密!(國中定性版 Magnus 效應)

beats.intro: Add SIDE-SPIN and curve the ball around the wall into the goal.
beats.introZh: 加入側旋,讓球彎繞過人牆、射進球門。
beats.q: When you increased the SPIN, the ball…
beats.fb: 你親手驗證了:spin 越大 → curve 越明顯。英文 + 物理一次搞懂!
